description: On July 13th we were told by Valentina Roumi that there were 2 RNGRs on the lake.  We relocated one swimming and one on what appeared to be a mound/nest.  When we returned on July 28th, we viewed one adult swimming with and feeding three juveniles.  Sex was indeterminable.  The adult was in breeding plumage (red neck with silvery chin/cheek patch) and the juveniles were the same medium shade of brown throughout.  Dagger shaped bill was distinct but it was difficult to determine the color of the bills.Ebird URL:  https://ebird.org/checklist/S145851259
